name: Patria Infraestrutura Energia Core Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura
summary: Patria Infraestrutura Energia Core Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura is a Brazilian investment fund focused on infrastructure projects within the energy sector. The fund makes investments in companies involved in power generation and distribution. PICE12 aims to offer investors exposure to the growing energy sector in Brazil.
